evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2800)); const m=document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal'); r.abierto=!!m; r.tieneSVG=!!m?.querySelector('svg polyline'); r.leyenda=(document.getElementById('pcCurvasLeyenda')||{}).textContent; r.precio=(document.getElementById('pcPrecio')||{}).value; r.margen=(document.getElementById('pcMargen')||{}).value; r.costo=(document.querySelector('#pcCurvasModal .mono.grow')||{}).textContent; return r; })()
